description:
Control and stream any computer running Remio Host, right from your Windows PC.

Remio Client lets your Windows PC view and control another computer running Remio Host — over the local network or the internet.

Built from scratch with native WinUI 3 — no Electron, no browser wrappers. Low-latency GPU-accelerated H.264/H.265 video, full keyboard and mouse control, multi-monitor support, clipboard sync, drag-and-drop file transfer, and gamepad passthrough. Installs per-user — no admin required.

Includes built-in auto-updates via WinSparkle (EdDSA-signed end-to-end), so you always have the latest version with one click.
Remio Client 1.9.3 — a smoother first-time install.

- Remio Client now starts reliably on a brand-new Windows PC with nothing else to install first.
- Plus under-the-hood polish for a calmer, more dependable stream.
